footer.brand_desc: Iduka rikuru ry'ibikoresho byo gufotora na sitidiyo ikora ibihangano. Duteza imbere abahanzi mu Rwanda hose.

hero.title: Zamurira Iyerekwa Ryawe Rw'Ihanga
hero.subtitle: Ibikoresho byo gufotora byo ku rwego rwo hejuru n'ahantu ha sitidiyo ho ku rwego rw'isi rwagati muri Kigali. Ibintu byose ukeneye kugira ngo ukore ibihangano bitangaje.

services.sales_desc: Kamera nziza, lens, amatara, n'ibikoresho bituruka mu nganda zikomeye nka Sony, Canon, na Nikon.
services.rental_desc: Sitidiyo zo gufotora, videwo, na podcast zabigize umwuga zifite ibikoresho byo ku rwego rwo hejuru.
services.production_desc: Ubufasha bwuzuye mu gukora ibyamamaza, gukora ibihangano, n'imishinga y'ubuhanzi.

featured.title: Ibikoresho Byatoranyijwe
featured.subtitle: Ibikoresho byabigize umwuga byizerwa n'abahanzi ku isi hose

studio_cta.title: Aho Sitidiyo yo Ku Rwego rw'Isi
studio_cta.desc: Kuva ku gufata amajwi ya podcast kugeza ku gukora videwo zamamaza, sitidiyo zacu zifite ibikoresho byabigize umwuga kandi zagenewe abahanzi bashaka indashyikirwa.
studio_cta.feature_1: Amatara yabigize umwuga no gutunganya amajwi
studio_cta.feature_2: Kamera n'ibikoresho by'amajwi byo ku rwego rwo hejuru

testimonials.title: Ibyo Abahanzi Bavuga
testimonials.subtitle: Byizerwa n'abafotora, abakora videwo, n'abakora ibihangano

list.name: Yassin Alqnas
list.text: Ni ahantu hatuje cyane, heza ho gufotolera.

list.name: Basheer
list.text:
Gufata amajwi ya podcast yanjye muri CanLens Studio byabaye ibihe byiza. Namaze gufatira hano ibice byinshi, kandi ntegereje gufata ibindi byinshi.

Umwanya urisanzuye, ibikoresho ni bigezweho kandi byizewe, n'ubwiza bw'ibikorwa muri rusange bwabaye icyo nashakaga rwose.

Ndashimira by'umwihariko Mutasim kubw'ubunyamwuga bwe, ubufasha bwe, no koroha gukorana nawe. Ni nako bimeze kuri Kevin na Bereer - imyitwarire yabo myiza n'umwuka w'akazi byatumye buri gihe cyo gufata amajwi kiba gishimishije.

Ndashishikariza cyane CanLens Studio umuntu wese ushaka ahantu h'ubuhanzi, h'ubunyamwuga, kandi hakirana urugwiro kugira ngo ashyire mu bikorwa ibitekerezo bye.

list.name: Ahmed Esam
list.text:
Nshuti Mutasim, urakoze ku bugwaneza bwawe n'ubufasha bwawe mu gihe cyo gufata amashusho yacu.

Ubufasha bwawe mu kuduha ahantu heza byatumye akazi kacu koroha kandi kaba keza cyane.

Turashimira by'ukuri ubuntu bwawe n'ubushake bwawe bwo kudufasha igihe cyose tubikeneye.

Ubufasha bwawe bwagize uruhare rukomeye mu gutuma byose bigenda neza.

Nkwifurije gukomeza kugira intsinzi, kandi urakoze kongera kugufasha.

list.name: Mohamed Abbas
list.text:
Dushingiye ku burambe bwanjye bwite, CanLens Studio ni ahantu heza cyane kuri:

• Gukora ibiganiro
• Gufotora ibirori
• Umuntu wese ukunda ubuhanzi no kugaragara neza
• Ubwiza buhanitse ku giciro cyiza

final_cta.title: Witeguye Gukora Ikintu Gitangaje?
final_cta.desc: Sura inzu yacu imurikirwamo ibintu i Kigali cyangwa uvugane n'ikipe yacu. Turi hano kugira ngo dufashe gushyira mu bikorwa iyerekwa ryawe ry'ubuhanzi.

shop.hero_title: Ibikoresho byo ku Rwego rwo Hejuru
shop.hero_subtitle: Ibikoresho byo gufotora no gufata videwo byabigize umwuga bituruka mu nganda zikomeye ku isi
shop.no_results: Nta bicuruzwa byabonetse bihuye n'ibyo washakishije

cart.title: Ikarita yo Guhaha
cart.toast_checkout: Komande yawe yakiriwe neza! Turaguhamagara vuba.

wishlist.empty_subtitle: Bika ibintu ukunda kugira ngo uzabirebe nyuma
wishlist.title: Ibyo Nifuza

studio.hero_title: Aho Sitidiyo yo Ku Rwego rwo Hejuru
studio.hero_subtitle: Sitidiyo zifite ibikoresho byose bya podcast, gufotora, gukora videwo, no gukora ibihangano
studio.faq_1_q: Nkabanza gufata umwanya mbere y'igihe kingana iki?
studio.faq_1_a: Tugugira inama yo gufata umwanya nibura amasaha 48 mbere, ariko kenshi dushobora kwakira abafata umwanya ku munsi umwe bitewe n'umwanya uhari.
studio.faq_2_a: Ibikoresho byose byanditswe, ubufasha bwa tekiniki, Wi-Fi, n'ibikenerwa by'ibanze. Serivisi z'inyongera nk'abafata videwo cyangwa abafotora zishobora gutegurwa ukwabyo.
studio.faq_3_a: Yego rwose! Urakaza neza kuzana ibindi bikoresho. Ikipe yacu ishobora kugufasha kubihuza n'ibikoresho bya sitidiyo.
studio.faq_4_q: Hari igihe gito gishoboka cyo gufata umwanya?
studio.faq_4_a: Sitidiyo nyinshi zisaba nibura isaha 1. Ku mishinga y'ubucuruzi minini, dutanga ibiciro byagabanyijwe by'igice cy'umunsi n'umunsi wose.
studio.dialog_desc: Uzuza imyirondoro yawe kugira ngo ufate iyi sitidiyo

portfolio.hero_subtitle: Kwerekana ibikorwa byacu byiza mu gufotora, ibirori, no gukora ibihangano

about.hero_subtitle: Ahantu ha mbere mu Rwanda ku bikoresho byo gufotora n'ahantu ho gukorera
about.story_p1: Yashinzwe mu 2020, CanLens Studio yavutse ku gitekerezo cyoroshye: guha abahanzi mu Rwanda ubushobozi bwo kubona ibikoresho byo ku rwego rw'isi na sitidiyo z'umwuga.
about.story_p2: Icyatangiye nk'iduka rito rikodesha ibikoresho i Kigali, cyakuze kiba ihuriro ry'ubuhanzi, gifasha abafotora, abakora videwo, n'amasosiyete akora ibihangano muri Afurika y'Iburasirazuba.
about.story_p3: Uyu munsi, twishimiye kuba umufatanyabikorwa wizewe w'abahanzi mu Rwanda, dutanga byose kuva kuri camera nshya kugeza kuri sitidiyo zuzuye kubikorwa byose.
about.mission_desc: Kugeza ku bantu bose ibikoresho by'umwuga byo gufotora na videwo, guha abahanzi ubushobozi bwo gushyira mu bikorwa ibitekerezo byabo nta nkomyi.
about.vision_desc: Kuba ihuriro ry'ubuhanzi rya mbere muri Afurika y'Iburasirazuba, rimenyekanye kubera ubuziranenge, udushya, no gushyigikira abahanzi b'ejo hazaza.
about.value_quality_desc: Tubika kandi tugafata neza ibikoresho bya brand zizewe gusa.
about.value_creator_desc: Buri cyemezo dufata gishingiye kucyafasha abahanzi bacu.
about.value_innovation_desc: Dukomeza kuvugurura ibikoresho na sitidiyo zacu n'ikoranabuhanga rishya.
about.bio_founder: Imyaka 15+ mu gufotora no gukora ibihangano
about.bio_technical: Inzobere mu bikoresho bya sitidiyo n'ikoranabuhanga
about.bio_studio: Yita ku mikorere myiza ya sitidiyo

contact.hero_subtitle: Ufite ibibazo? Twakwishimira kukumva. Twohereze ubutumwa tuzagusubiza vuba bishoboka.
